properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Xerophon is not unlocked with this skin. Xerophon can only be unlocked by completing A Lesson in Classes - the second Variant of the The Fall of Ythryn adventure in the Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden Campaign.

backstory.original: Xerophon went to sleep as a prisoner in a Netherese floating city, and awoke centuries later to the Champions asking them questions about a glacier. To say it's been a rough day would be an understatement. In an attempt to avoid the icy tomb of Ythryn, Xerophon joins with the Champions and is willing to see where this decision takes them. After all, they've played many roles in their life, but never the hero.
backstory.display: 瑟诺芬是耐瑟瑞尔浮空城里的一名囚犯，他在那里睡了一觉，数百年后醒来，勇士队却在问他关于冰川的问题。说他经历了苦难的一天已经足够含蓄了。为了避免伊斯林成为一座冰霜大墓，瑟诺芬加入了勇士队，他想看看他们的决定最终会引导大家走向何方。毕竟他曾在一生中扮演过许多角色，但从未当过英雄。

description.original: Xerophon stabs a random enemy
description.display: 瑟诺芬刺击一名随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Xerophon leaps at a random enemy and stabs them with thier dagger.
longDescription.display: 瑟诺芬向一名随机敌人跳跃，并用匕首刺击该敌人。

description.original: Xerophon imitates an enemy and buffs all Champions for 60 seconds.
description.display: 瑟诺芬模仿一名敌人，并使所有勇士获得 60 秒的增益。

longDescription.original: Xerophon picks an enemy from the current adventure and imitates them for 60 seconds. While the imitation lasts, Xerophon does not attack, but increases the damage of all Champions. If the enemy has been seen in the past 15 seconds the damage increase is further buffed.
longDescription.display: 瑟诺芬从当前的冒险中挑选一名敌人并模仿他们 60 秒。当处于模仿状态时，瑟诺芬不会攻击，但会提高所有勇士的伤害。如果在过去 15 秒内此敌人曾经出现，则伤害将进一步提高。

conditions.desc: When Xerophon uses Perfect Imitation they pick a monster from the current adventure and imitates them for 60 seconds. While the imitation lasts, Xerophon does not attack, but increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)%. If the monster Xerophon is imitating has been seen in the past 15 seconds the damage is increased by an further $(amount___2)%.

^^Imitation Target: $(xerophon_perfect_imitation_target_name)^Time since last $(xerophon_perfect_imitation_target_name): $(xerophon_perfect_imitation_target_alive_timer)^Time Remaining: $(xerophon_perfect_imitation_timer)^Total Damage Bonus: $(amount)%
当瑟诺芬使用完美模仿时，他会从当前冒险中选择一个怪物并模仿它，持续 60 秒。在模仿的持续时间内，瑟诺芬不会攻击，但会使所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。如果瑟诺芬模仿的怪物曾在过去的 15 秒内出现过，伤害加成额外提高 $(amount___2)%。

^^模仿目标：$(xerophon_perfect_imitation_target_name)^$(xerophon_perfect_imitation_target_name)上次出现后经过的时间：$(xerophon_perfect_imitation_target_alive_timer)^剩余时间：$(xerophon_perfect_imitation_timer)^总伤害加成：$(amount)%

tipText.original: While Xerophon is transformed, they do not attack; however, all Champions deal more damage.
tipText.display: 当瑟诺芬被转化时，它们不会攻击；然而，所有勇士都会造成更大的伤害。

description.desc: Decrease the cooldown of Perfect Imitation by $(amount) seconds for every other Champion in the formation with a STR score of 13 or higher.

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: Champions in Formation Targeted: $num_stacks

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位力量大于等于 13 的其他勇士，使完美模仿的冷却时间减少 $(amount) 秒。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Xerophon focuses on their bond with Champions with the highest strength
specializationDescription.display: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与实力最强的勇士的联系

description.desc: Decrease the cooldown of Perfect Imitation by $(amount) seconds for every other Champion in the formation with a STR score of 12 or lower.

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位力量小于等于 12 的其他勇士，使完美模仿的冷却时间减少 $(amount) 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Xerophon focuses on their bond with Champions with the lowest strength
specializationDescription.display: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与实力最弱的勇士的联系

description.desc: Increase the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)%. Further increased by $(amount___2)% for each stack of Adaptable Xerophon has. Each champion provides Adaptable stacks based on the number of specializations that they do not qualify for.
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。瑟诺芬每拥有 1 层“适应能力”，额外提高 $(amount___2)%。根据每位勇士放弃的专精数量获得“适应能力”堆叠层数。

tipText.original: Xerophon causes all Champions to deal more damage, this is buffed by the number of Champion ability scores that do NOT match their specialization choices.
tipText.display: 瑟诺芬造成所有勇士造成更多的伤害，这是由勇士技能分数的数量，不符合他们的专精选择。

如果完美模仿生效时唯一存活的敌人是首领，每秒使完美模仿的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%（乘算）。杀招结束时堆叠层数会重置。
Decrease the cooldown of Perfect Imitation by $(amount) seconds for every other Champion in the formation with a CON score of 13 or higher.

每在冒险中使用一次完美模仿，使其伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%（乘算），最多可叠加 $(max_stacks___2) 次。冒险重置时堆叠层数也会重置。
Decrease the cooldown of Perfect Imitation by $(amount) seconds for every other Champion in the formation with a INT score of 13 or higher.

完美模仿生效期间，每当被瑟诺芬模仿的敌人（或拥有相同名称的敌人）被击杀，使其伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%（乘算）。杀招结束时堆叠层数会重置。
Decrease the cooldown of Perfect Imitation by $(amount) seconds for every other Champion in the formation with a WIS score of 13 or higher.

specializationDescription.original: Xerophon focuses on their bond with Champions with the lowest charisma
specializationDescription.display: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与魅力最低的勇士的联系

description.original: My future depends on the strength of my friends.
description.display: 我的未来取决于我的朋友们的强度。

description.original: Netheril couldn't break me, and neither can this.
description.display: 耐瑟瑞尔没能击垮我，这玩意也一样。

description.original: Who you seem to be is only a fraction of who you are.
description.display: 你的外表只是你整个人的一小部分。

description.original: Who you are inside -- who you can become -- is paramount.
description.display: 你的内心是什么人--你能成为什么样的人--才是最重要的。

description.original: Who me? I've been here for years.
description.display: 谁？我吗？我来这里很多年了。

description.original: I don't want to gossip, but I think that one over there is a traitor...
description.display: 我不想多八卦，但我觉得那家伙应该是个叛徒......

description.original: I look more 'you' than you do.
description.display: 我看起来比你还像你。

description.original: The folly of not getting to know your subordinates -- tsk!
description.display: 不明白自己的从属地位是愚蠢的--嘶！

description.original: Head for the top! Quickly!
description.display: 争取最佳成绩！快点！

description.original: I spent a thousand years in a glacier --  I've toughened up.
description.display: 我在冰川上花费了上千年--我已经足够坚强了。

description.original: There's a way through this if we plan carefully.
description.display: 如果小心计划，我们还是有机会成功的。

description.original: From Ten-Towns to Ythryn, from the Spine to the frozen sea, I shall defend this place.
description.display: 从十镇到伊斯林，从脊背山脉到冰冻海洋，我将捍卫这片土地。

effects.description: Xerophon may be used in any Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventure or variant when a patron is enabled, even if the patron or variant restrictions would normally restrict them.

description.original: A knife is a versatile tool, for a commoner or an assassin.
description.display: 对于普通人和刺客来说，匕首都是一种多用途工具。

description.original: Once upon a time, this was my trade and my companion.
description.display: 曾经有段时间，它就是我的工具和我的伙伴。

description.original: This fits my hand well -- but I'll put it to more heroic purposes than the old one.
description.display: 它很适合我的手--但相比起之前的那把，我会用它来做一些更英勇的事。

description.original: A reminder of a time and place I've left behind. I doubt Ythyrn's dead will mind.
description.display: 让我想起了曾经抛下的那个时代和地方。我想伊斯林的死是不会介意的。

description.original: My ability to disguise myself is unparalleled... but it wasn't enough to save me.
description.display: 我伪装自己的能力无人能比......但这不足以拯救我自己。

description.original: The wizard trapped me with his magic and these bindings for thousands of years.
description.display: 那个法师用他的魔法和这些带子困住了我几千年。

description.original: I was freed to a new world--Ythryn beneath a glacier, Netheril long crumbled to dust and legend
description.display: 我自由地来到一个新世界--冰川下的伊斯林，耐瑟瑞尔早就粉碎成了尘土与传说

description.original: My future lays before me -- a new path, a new me. I am no one's tool and no one's captive.
description.display: 我的未来就在眼前--一条崭新的路，一个全新的我。我不是谁的工具，也不是谁的俘虏。

description.original: It doesn't even take the edge off.
description.display: 它几乎一点效果都没有。

description.original: The cold seeps through this fabric, but it's better than going without.
description.display: 寒冷会渗透这些布料，但总比不穿好。

description.original: The walls are slick, but this is what I trained for so long ago.
description.display: 墙很滑，但我已经练过很长时间了。

description.original: It bites into Ythryn's ice like its former own once bit into its prey.
description.display: 它插进伊斯林的冰块里容易得就像它原来的主人撕咬猎物一样简单。

description.original: The pages are mildewed and fragile.
description.display: 纸已经发霉了，一碰就碎。

description.original: Inside are the memories of Netheril's most powerful wizards.
description.display: 里面是耐瑟瑞尔最强大的法师们的回忆。

description.original: I had to be stealthy to steal this from the Nether Oak while it was dormant.
description.display: 我趁着幽冥橡树冬眠的时候悄悄留进去才把它偷了出来。

description.original: Netherese ingenuity at its finest -- why is this world not lit with magic everywhere?
description.display: 耐瑟瑞尔最优秀的发明--为什么这个世界没有到处都被魔法照亮呢？

description.original: The first rule of the game chain lightning is don't let this hit you.
description.display: 闪电链游戏的第一条规则就是别让这东西打中你。

description.original: If this hits, it leaves a bruise and you're out. If you can get it charged though...
description.display: 如果被它打中，会留下一块淤痕，然后你就被淘汰了。如果你能给它充能的话......

description.original: Pass the ball through these tines so that it charges up.
description.display: 把球通过这些叉传出去，让它充能。

description.original: Hit an opponent with a charged ball and they won't just be out of the game!
description.display: 用充能的闪电球打中敌人，他们的下场就不止是被淘汰这么简单了！

description.original: I dressed my best while impersonating the wizard.
description.display: 假扮法师的时候，我会穿上我最好的衣服。

description.original: It was easy to blend in with Ythryn's mage class while wearing this.
description.display: 穿着这个能很轻松地融入伊斯林的法师阶级。

description.original: I get the impression my outfit's a little out of date...
description.display: 我觉得我的装束有点过时了......

description.original: Jarlaxle gifted me this hat to mark my new life's beginning. How does it look?
description.display: 这是贾拉索送给我的，让我纪念新人生的开始。它看起来怎么样？

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Melee Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Xerophon went to sleep as a prisoner in a Netherese floating city, and awoke centuries later to the Champions asking them questions about a glacier. To say it's been a rough day would be an understatement. In an attempt to avoid the icy tomb of Ythryn, Xerophon joins with the Champions and is willing to see where this decision takes them. After all, they've played many roles in their life, but never the hero.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Xerophon is not unlocked with this skin. Xerophon can only be unlocked by completing A Lesson in Classes - the second Variant of the The Fall of Ythryn adventure in the Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 瑟诺芬是耐瑟瑞尔浮空城里的一名囚犯，他在那里睡了一觉，数百年后醒来，勇士队却在问他关于冰川的问题。说他经历了苦难的一天已经足够含蓄了。为了避免伊斯林成为一座冰霜大墓，瑟诺芬加入了勇士队，他想看看他们的决定最终会引导大家走向何方。毕竟他曾在一生中扮演过许多角色，但从未当过英雄。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士瑟诺芬不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“职业课程”——“冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜”战役中“伊斯林的陨落”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁瑟诺芬。

display.specialization_description: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与敏捷度最高的勇士的联系

display.specialization_description: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与精力最充沛的勇士的联系

display.specialization_description: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与精力最不充沛的勇士的联系

display.specialization_description: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与感知最高的勇士的联系

display.specialization_description: 瑟诺芬专注于他们与感知最低的勇士的联系

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: My future depends on the strength of my friends.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 我的未来取决于我的朋友们的强度。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Netheril couldn't break me, and neither can this.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 耐瑟瑞尔没能击垮我，这玩意也一样。

original.name: Look Into the Mirror
original.description: Who you seem to be is only a fraction of who you are.

display.name: 直视镜子
display.description: 你的外表只是你整个人的一小部分。

original.name: Who You Want to Be
original.description: Who you are inside -- who you can become -- is paramount.

display.name: 你想成为什么样的人
display.description: 你的内心是什么人--你能成为什么样的人--才是最重要的。

original.name: Rising Up the Ranks
original.description: Who me? I've been here for years.

display.name: 熬出头
display.description: 谁？我吗？我来这里很多年了。

original.name: Who to Trust?
original.description: I don't want to gossip, but I think that one over there is a traitor...

display.name: 能信任谁？
display.description: 我不想多八卦，但我觉得那家伙应该是个叛徒......

original.name: Perfect Double
original.description: I look more 'you' than you do.

display.name: 完美双重
display.description: 我看起来比你还像你。

original.name: Viper in Their Midst
original.description: The folly of not getting to know your subordinates -- tsk!

display.name: 人中毒蛇
display.description: 不明白自己的从属地位是愚蠢的--嘶！

original.name: Athlete
original.description: Head for the top! Quickly!

display.name: 运动员
display.description: 争取最佳成绩！快点！

original.name: Durable
original.description: I spent a thousand years in a glacier --  I've toughened up.

display.name: 耐久
display.description: 我在冰川上花费了上千年--我已经足够坚强了。

original.name: Keen Mind
original.description: There's a way through this if we plan carefully.

display.name: 敏锐思维
display.description: 如果小心计划，我们还是有机会成功的。

original.name: Guardian of Icewind Dale
original.description: From Ten-Towns to Ythryn, from the Spine to the frozen sea, I shall defend this place.

effects.description: Xerophon may be used in any Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventure or variant when a patron is enabled, even if the patron or variant restrictions would normally restrict them.

display.name: 冰风谷守护者
display.description: 从十镇到伊斯林，从脊背山脉到冰冻海洋，我将捍卫这片土地。

effects.description: 启用赞助者时，瑟诺芬可用于任何冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜冒险或支线任务，即便赞助者或支线任务的限制条件在通常情况下会限制瑟诺芬参加，瑟诺芬也可以参加。

original.name: Cutting Edge
original.description: A knife is a versatile tool, for a commoner or an assassin.

display.name: 小刀
display.description: 对于普通人和刺客来说，匕首都是一种多用途工具。

original.name: Tool of the Trade
original.description: Once upon a time, this was my trade and my companion.

display.name: 行业工具
display.description: 曾经有段时间，它就是我的工具和我的伙伴。

original.name: Polished Dagger
original.description: This fits my hand well -- but I'll put it to more heroic purposes than the old one.

display.name: 打磨过的匕首
display.description: 它很适合我的手--但相比起之前的那把，我会用它来做一些更英勇的事。

original.name: Blade of the Ages
original.description: A reminder of a time and place I've left behind. I doubt Ythyrn's dead will mind.

display.name: 时代之刃
display.description: 让我想起了曾经抛下的那个时代和地方。我想伊斯林的死是不会介意的。

original.name: Tattered Bindings
original.description: My ability to disguise myself is unparalleled... but it wasn't enough to save me.

display.name: 破烂绑带
display.description: 我伪装自己的能力无人能比......但这不足以拯救我自己。

original.name: Broken Straps
original.description: The wizard trapped me with his magic and these bindings for thousands of years.

display.name: 破损的带子
display.description: 那个法师用他的魔法和这些带子困住了我几千年。

original.name: Remains of Imprisonment
original.description: I was freed to a new world--Ythryn beneath a glacier, Netheril long crumbled to dust and legend

display.name: 禁锢的残留物
display.description: 我自由地来到一个新世界--冰川下的伊斯林，耐瑟瑞尔早就粉碎成了尘土与传说

original.name: Reminder of Freedom
original.description: My future lays before me -- a new path, a new me. I am no one's tool and no one's captive.

display.name: 自由的纪念品
display.description: 我的未来就在眼前--一条崭新的路，一个全新的我。我不是谁的工具，也不是谁的俘虏。

original.name: Flimsy Cloak
original.description: It doesn't even take the edge off.

display.name: 薄弱斗篷
display.description: 它几乎一点效果都没有。

original.name: Cold Weather Wear
original.description: The cold seeps through this fabric, but it's better than going without.

display.name: 冷天的着装
display.description: 寒冷会渗透这些布料，但总比不穿好。

original.name: Trusty Hook
original.description: The walls are slick, but this is what I trained for so long ago.

display.name: 生锈的钩子
display.description: 墙很滑，但我已经练过很长时间了。

original.name: Jawbone Pick
original.description: It bites into Ythryn's ice like its former own once bit into its prey.

display.name: 颚骨锥子
display.description: 它插进伊斯林的冰块里容易得就像它原来的主人撕咬猎物一样简单。

original.name: Ancient History
original.description: The pages are mildewed and fragile.

display.name: 远古历史
display.description: 纸已经发霉了，一碰就碎。

original.name: Tome of the Empire
original.description: Inside are the memories of Netheril's most powerful wizards.

display.name: 帝国书卷
display.description: 里面是耐瑟瑞尔最强大的法师们的回忆。

original.name: Nether Oak Wand
original.description: I had to be stealthy to steal this from the Nether Oak while it was dormant.

display.name: 幽冥橡树魔杖
display.description: 我趁着幽冥橡树冬眠的时候悄悄留进去才把它偷了出来。

original.name: Driftglobe
original.description: Netherese ingenuity at its finest -- why is this world not lit with magic everywhere?

display.name: 漂流球
display.description: 耐瑟瑞尔最优秀的发明--为什么这个世界没有到处都被魔法照亮呢？

original.name: Iron Ball
original.description: The first rule of the game chain lightning is don't let this hit you.

display.name: 铁球
display.description: 闪电链游戏的第一条规则就是别让这东西打中你。

original.name: Galvanic Sphere
original.description: If this hits, it leaves a bruise and you're out. If you can get it charged though...

display.name: 电流球
display.description: 如果被它打中，会留下一块淤痕，然后你就被淘汰了。如果你能给它充能的话......

original.name: Tines of Lightning
original.description: Pass the ball through these tines so that it charges up.

display.name: 闪电叉
display.description: 把球通过这些叉传出去，让它充能。

original.name: Storm Orb
original.description: Hit an opponent with a charged ball and they won't just be out of the game!

display.name: 风暴之球
display.description: 用充能的闪电球打中敌人，他们的下场就不止是被淘汰这么简单了！

original.name: Ancient Garb
original.description: I dressed my best while impersonating the wizard.

display.name: 远古装束
display.description: 假扮法师的时候，我会穿上我最好的衣服。

original.name: Imperial Attire
original.description: It was easy to blend in with Ythryn's mage class while wearing this.

display.name: 帝国服装
display.description: 穿着这个能很轻松地融入伊斯林的法师阶级。

original.name: Cloak of Another Age
original.description: I get the impression my outfit's a little out of date...

display.name: 异时代斗篷
display.description: 我觉得我的装束有点过时了......

original.name: Fresh New Look
original.description: Jarlaxle gifted me this hat to mark my new life's beginning. How does it look?

display.name: 崭新外观
display.description: 这是贾拉索送给我的，让我纪念新人生的开始。它看起来怎么样？

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
所有非二元性别勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有智力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Melee Champions by $(amount)%
使所有近战勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
